[Click Here to Verify Your Account]

Please note that this verification is required to prevent your account from being suspended. If you have already verified your account, you may safely ignore this message.

Should you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team at [Customer Support Email] or call us at [Phone Number].

Thank you for being a valued customer at [Your Bank Name].

Best regards,  
[Your Bank Name]  
Customer Support Team

P.S. If you did not request this verification, please contact us immediately to secure your account.

---
